query:
INSERT INTO media_catalogue (title, cdnUrl, category, bridge, description, blockRef, tags, sortOrder) VALUES
('IAAI Gold Logo', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030220481/kUQZAex2uPvgKcHnt7bmh3/iaai_correct_gold_logo_cebb3b74.jpeg', 'logo', 'ACAD', 'Official IAAI gold logo', 'B398', 'logo,iaai,brand', 1),

('Front & Back Cover', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663030220481/TMCfiwGkUBtperTy.jpg', 'book', 'ACAD', 'Episode 1: Earthbound Foundations - Front and Back Cover', 'B398', 'book,cover,episode1', 3),

('Complete Framework Summary', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663030220481/WqoUeVQLqPkBGaJs.PNG', 'framework', 'ACAD', 'Volume 1 Perspective, Volume 2 Guide, Volume 3 Game', 'B398', 'framework,volumes,summary', 6),
('Three Modes Diagram', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663030220481/zVNEGkHrHmcNNeZe.PNG', 'framework', 'ACAD', 'West (Discontinuous/Built), East (Continuous/Built), Outrider (Semi-Continuous/Temporary)', 'B398', 'modes,west,east,outrider', 7),
('12 Civilisational Relays', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663030220481/dGyIUSiwUJMMQAFr.PNG', 'framework', 'ACAD', 'Fire, Tree, River, Horse, Roads, Ships, Loom, Rail, Engine, AAA Triad, Orbit, Human Nodes', 'B398', 'relays,12,civilisation', 8),

('Challenge Stats Infographic', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030220481/kUQZAex2uPvgKcHnt7bmh3/IMG_1063_b051fa21.PNG', 'stats', 'ACAD', 'Infrastructure education gap statistics with 6 academic references', 'B398', 'stats,education,challenge', 10),
('Trilogy Vision', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663030220481/zXxdTjMnqKydzifl.jpg', 'framework', 'ACAD', 'Episode 1 Earthbound, Episode 2 Reality Engines, Episode 3 Stewardship', 'B398', 'trilogy,vision,episodes', 11);
